metadata.description: Marketplace hosting Claude Code plugins by johnnybs.

plugins.name: pr-pilot
plugins.description: Drives a change from idea to merged PR: clarify, plan, worktree, implement, test, open PR, wait on CI, fix, merge.

plugins.name: development-agents
plugins.description: General coding-focused subagents: architecture and clean-code reviewers, a performance analyst, a debugger/root-cause investigator, and a web-research agent.

plugins.name: game-dev-agents
plugins.description: Game-development subagents: engine-agnostic game-design and game-feel advisors, plus Ebiten/Go gameplay-systems (ECS), shader-graphics (Kage), and audio advisors.
